回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 中英對比分析 (Chinese and English Contrastive Analysis)	開課班級 : 應英四甲	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 李盈興	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
This course is designed for students who will need some familiarity with the fundamentals of linguistic knowledge in order to help them practice their profession in the future. This includes specialties in such fields as foreign language pedagogy, speech-language pathology, and technical and business communication. Since this is an introductory course, students are oriented to “do” linguistics or “analyze” languages with a focus on Chinese and English data. Student will thus review what they have already known or acquire the new patterns of both languages from a linguistic perspective. Students are strongly recommended to have taken Introduction to English Linguistics I & II and have mastered considerable fluency of Chinese and English before coming to this course. 本課程建議選課生預先修習過英語語言學概論(一)與(二)，並且具備相當程度的中英語文程度。 


2.教學綱要
The content of this semester contains:
- Phonetics and Phonology
- Vocabulary and Morphology
- Syntax and Semantics
- Pragmatics and Discourse

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluations: (1) Midterm Exam 30%, (2) Final Exam 30%, (3) Reviews 20%, (4) Presentation 10%, (5) Participation 10%. 
Requirements: Students are required to prepare the weekly materials before they come to class. Students should participate in the midterm exam, final exam, group presentation, and two in-class quizzes. The teacher will check the attendance; those who are absent or come late will lose 1 score from the final grades for each time. Students should also show respect to others in the class by not talking aloud, not wandering from the seats, and not surfing the Internet on their smartphones. They should understand and be responsible for their grades. 
 


8.永續發展目標(SDGs)：SDG4 優質教育


9.大學社會責任(USR)關聯性：高
